# Agent Interop — knowledge

## decision
- [OpenShell chosen as strategic bet over Kagenti](/features/agent-interop/knowledge/decision-openshell-strategic-bet.md) — [redacted: moved to restricted/]

## fact
- [Agent Interop overview](/features/agent-interop/knowledge/fact-agent-interop-overview.md) — What agent-interop covers — sandboxing (OpenShell), identity (SPIFFE/SPIRE), A2A, agent cards, BYO agent onboarding, discovery, declarative harness config — and current status.
- [OpenShell architecture](/features/agent-interop/knowledge/fact-openshell-architecture.md) — Supervisor-based sandbox model (no sidecar), kernel-level isolation (Landlock/seccomp/netns), driver model, gateway-centric; three-crate decomposition (proxy/runtime/sandbox).
- [OpenShell capability gaps from Kagenti](/features/agent-interop/knowledge/fact-openshell-capability-gaps.md) — What OpenShell lacks that Kagenti had (or planned) -- declarative CR, GitOps, Agent Runtime Contract, token exchange at high severity; MLflow, A2A discovery, SPIFFE maturity at medium.
- [OpenShell product timeline (RHOAI integration)](/features/agent-interop/knowledge/fact-openshell-product-timeline.md) — Tentative milestones for OpenShell in RHOAI — DP in 3.5 (Jul-Aug 2026), TP in 3.6 EA (Nov 2026), GA in 3.7 (early 2027). Subject to change.
- [Slack: #agentops-leads](/features/agent-interop/knowledge/fact-slack-agentops-leads.md) — AgentOps engineering leadership coordination channel on Red Hat internal Slack (channel ID not yet confirmed).

## person
- [Adel Zaalouk](/features/agent-interop/knowledge/person-adel-zaalouk.md) — Product Manager, Agentic AI, AI BU -- driving OpenShell convergence, owns agent-interop strategy and field alignment.
- [Ann Marie Fred](/features/agent-interop/knowledge/person-ann-marie-fred.md) — AAET Chief Architect -- driving OpenShell alignment, cross-BU coordination.
- [Derek Carr](/features/agent-interop/knowledge/person-derek-carr.md) — Red Hat OpenShell Lead -- upstream community alignment, contribution coordination.
- [Dimitri Saridakis](/features/agent-interop/knowledge/person-dimitri-saridakis.md) — AgentOps Engineering Manager -- pragmatic, team was on Kagenti but pivoting to OpenShell.
- [Gordon Sim](/features/agent-interop/knowledge/person-gordon-sim.md) — Staff Engineer, Agent Identity -- contributing SPIFFE/identity work to OpenShell, closing the identity gap from Kagenti.
- [Roland Huss](/features/agent-interop/knowledge/person-roland-huss.md) — AAET Architect -- pro-OpenShell, upstream-first advocate, strong opinions on declarative config and operator design.

## question
- [Declarative agent configuration path for OpenShell](/features/agent-interop/knowledge/question-openshell-declarative-agent-config.md) — OpenShell has no CRD or K8s-native declarative path today; community discussion on right abstraction (SDK, console, provider config, or layered CR).
- [Multi-tenancy gap in OpenShell](/features/agent-interop/knowledge/question-openshell-multi-tenancy.md) — Neither OpenShell nor Kagenti implemented multi-tenancy; high priority for both NVIDIA and Red Hat, active community discussion on tenant model.
- [OpenShell elevated privilege requirements](/features/agent-interop/knowledge/question-openshell-privileged-scc.md) — OpenShell requires CAP_SYS_ADMIN and NetTrace to bootstrap sandboxes; flagged as red flag by enterprise customers. Working to eliminate when running inside VM boundary.
- [No known Rust FIPS path at Red Hat](/features/agent-interop/knowledge/question-openshell-rust-fips.md) — OpenShell is Rust-based; no known Rust FIPS certification path at Red Hat, which could block GA for regulated customers.
- [Which product ships OpenShell (SKU decision)](/features/agent-interop/knowledge/question-openshell-sku-product-home.md) — Open question on whether OpenShell ships as RHOAI component, separate Red Hat AI SKU, or OCP component. Impacts release cadence and engineering ownership.

## reference
- [kubernetes-sigs/agent-sandbox](/features/agent-interop/knowledge/ref-agent-sandbox-sig.md) — Kubernetes SIG for agent sandbox -- went v1beta1 Jun 2026; API still changing fast. Dependency for OpenShell productization.

- [Email: OpenShell Weekly Update June 15-19](/features/agent-interop/knowledge/ref-email-openshell-weekly-jun15.md) — Weekly update covering customer demand validation (enterprise sandbox demand), validated agent images two-tier model, internal consumers (Ansible, ACS/StackRox harness-openshell, ATAT Carbonite), operator scope discussion, Rust FIPS question.
- [Email: OpenShell Weekly Update June 22-26](/features/agent-interop/knowledge/ref-email-openshell-weekly-jun22.md) — Weekly update covering Agent Sandbox TP readiness (KATA-4728), Kata+OpenShell layered security demo, RHAI+MaaS interop testing, base images update, v0.0.71 release, internal consumers (DevSpaces, Vault), FSI customer interest.
- [stackrox/harness-openshell](/features/agent-interop/knowledge/ref-harness-openshell-repo.md) — ACS/StackRox thin YAML-driven wrapper for OpenShell -- defines providers, policy, sandbox image, coding harness config deployable to local or remote gateways.
- [HATSTRAT-314](/features/agent-interop/knowledge/ref-hatstrat-314.md) — Strategy epic with outcomes related to former Kagenti work and future OpenShell work.
- [Kagenti GitHub organization](/features/agent-interop/knowledge/ref-kagenti-github-org.md) — Former upstream for agent lifecycle management -- being wound down for downstream productization; design concepts inform OpenShell contributions.
- [Kagenti to OpenShell: Executive Summary](/features/agent-interop/knowledge/ref-kagenti-openshell-executive-summary.md) — Adel's executive summary recommending consolidation onto OpenShell -- recommendation, capability comparison table, key risks, action items, milestone timeline.
- [Agentic AI FAQ (includes OpenShell/Kagenti positioning)](/features/agent-interop/knowledge/ref-kagenti-openshell-faq.md) — Comprehensive FAQ covering full agentic strategy, OpenShell positioning, Kagenti wind-down, ogx, MCP gateway, partners, field guidance. Maintained by Adel Zaalouk, last updated Jul 7 2026.
- [Kagenti vs. OpenShell: Strategic Assessment](/features/agent-interop/knowledge/ref-kagenti-openshell-strategic-assessment.md) — Full strategic assessment with capability comparison, feature gap analysis (high/medium severity), architecture comparison (sidecar vs supervisor), migration path, key risks, key people, and customer list.
- [OpenShell Crate Decomposition -- Architecture and Agent UX](/features/agent-interop/knowledge/ref-openshell-crate-decomposition-doc.md) — Architecture doc on the three-crate split (proxy/runtime/sandbox per RFC
- [NVIDIA/OpenShell GitHub repository](/features/agent-interop/knowledge/ref-openshell-github-repo.md) — The anchor upstream for agent sandboxing -- enterprise-grade sandbox for AI agents with kernel-level isolation, OPA policy, inference routing. 7300+ stars, 900+ forks.
- [OpenShell RFC 0001: Core Architecture](/features/agent-interop/knowledge/ref-openshell-rfc-0001.md) — RFC defining OpenShell's core architecture -- supervisor model, driver interfaces, gateway-centric design, deployment topologies.
- [OpenShell RFC 0002: Agent-Driven Policy Management](/features/agent-interop/knowledge/ref-openshell-rfc-0002.md) — RFC on Policy Advisor -- agents propose policy changes, developers review and approve (audit2allow-style flow).
- [Slack: #forum-openshell](/features/agent-interop/knowledge/ref-slack-forum-openshell.md) — Primary Red Hat internal Slack channel for OpenShell discussion -- engineering, product, field coordination.
